name: Barbecued Octopus with Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the octopus thoroughly and season with salt and pepper.
2. In a large bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, oregano or marjoram, and garlic clove until well combined.
3. Place the octopus in the marinade and turn off heat source to keep it at room temperature for at least 1 hour, turning occasionally.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill the octopus over direct heat for about 20 minutes per side, or until tender.
6. While grilling, chop the bell peppers into small pieces and mix with olive oil, lemon juice, oregano or marjoram, and garlic clove in a separate bowl.
7. Serve the grilled octopus topped with the pepper salad on the side.
